title: Mandatory Shopping Bag Charge (Spain)
goal: Enable a chargeable shopping bag product for Spain that customers can explicitly add within the cart flow, ensuring legal compliance, pricing transparency, and customer control.
description: A shopping bag is implemented as a standard product that can be enabled/disabled in Magento BE and displayed in the cart as a selectable tile. The shopping bag is not visible in PLP/SRP, can be added only from the cart, is not auto-added or pre-selected, and appears as a line item across cart, mini-cart, checkout, and order confirmation once selected. It respects stock availability, allows customer-controlled quantity, and updates totals in real time.
